summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FitBeats Spotify integration features. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Spotify search, playlist items with mixed types (Spotify + local mixes), and responsive mobile layout all functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts clicks on 'Crear' button - requires force=True in Playwright. May affect some users with slower connections.

passed_tests: GET /api/spotify/search?q=workout returns Spotify tracks with spotify_id, name, artist, album_image, duration_ms, uri
Frontend search page shows Spotify results with tab filters (Todo, Mixes, Spotify)
POST /api/playlists/{id}/items with type=spotify adds Spotify track to playlist
POST /api/playlists/{id}/items with type=mix adds local mix to playlist
GET /api/playlists/{id}/items returns enriched items with type field
Frontend playlist detail page displays both local mixes and Spotify tracks with correct icons
Player bar shows Spotify logo for Spotify tracks
Queue sidebar handles both track types correctly
Mobile responsive layout (768px) - sidebar hidden, mobile nav visible, player bar fixed bottom
Spotify search returns 20 tracks with album art, artist, duration
Tab filters (Todo/Mixes/Spotify) work correctly in search view
Playlist items show Spotify indicator (green dot) for Spotify tracks
Local mixes show album cover and duration in playlist
seed_data_creation: Created test playlist 'UI Test Playlist' via API with 1 Spotify track and 1 local mix for UI testing. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Spotify integration is fully functional. Backend uses client credentials for search (no user OAuth needed). Playlist items support mixed types (spotify/mix). The PlaylistDetailView correctly displays both types with appropriate icons. Mobile responsive layout works at 768px breakpoint with bottom navigation bar.
